name: pokedex-federation-tooling
description: Repo-level dev tooling only: husky hooks, lint-staged, and a repo-wide accessibility lint. The apps and packages are otherwise standalone (no workspaces); each builds and publishes on its own.

scripts.typecheck: for d in packages/ui apps/host apps/list apps/party apps/regions apps/detail; do echo "# typecheck $d"; (cd "$d" && npx tsc --noEmit) || exit 1; done
